Who We Are

A workshop built on
precision & elegance

Our solid surface fabrication workshop specializes in designing and executing integrated solutions using the finest solid surfaces, in accordance with the highest international standards of quality and precision. Thanks to our qualified technical teams and deep expertise in the field, we deliver professional services including cutting, shaping, and manufacturing solid surfaces tailored to residential, commercial, medical, and hospitality projects.

We are committed to providing custom designs distinguished by elegance, durability, and ease of maintenance, with a strong focus on meeting our clients' requirements with precision and a high level of professionalism. We also rely on the latest technologies and equipment to ensure ideal results that elevate the quality of interior finishes and add a refined, modern touch to any space.

We use the latest cutting, shaping, and welding techniques in our work, allowing us to execute custom designs that meet client expectations and align with various interior and architectural design styles. We always strive to deliver added value through professional craftsmanship and attention to detail, making us a trusted partner in finishing and interior fit-out projects.

What We Do

Our Services

01
Kitchen & Bath Countertops

Custom-designed work surfaces for kitchens and vanities — seamless, hygienic, and built to last.

02
Reception & Office Counters

Sophisticated reception desks and office fit-outs tailored to your brand and space.

03
Medical & Laboratory Surfaces

Bacteria-resistant, seamless solid surfaces for operating rooms, labs, and clinics.

04
Hospitality & Hotel Fit-Outs

Custom units and finishes that elevate the guest experience — from five-star to boutique.

05
Commercial & Retail Interiors

Showrooms, malls, and coffee concepts with surfaces combining elegance and low maintenance.

06
Bespoke Fabrication

Waterfall edges, integrated sinks, complex shapes — executed to exact design specifications.
